description_long: This is a modern, tactical shotgun with a robust, industrial design, featuring a predominantly matte black finish and a compact, boxy profile. The main body is constructed from metal with visible mechanical details, including a series of evenly spaced venting slots along the top and side, and exposed wiring or tubing running beneath the barrel. The shotgun has a pistol grip and a short, angular stock, providing ergonomic handling. The magazine is box-shaped and protrudes downward, suggesting a high-capacity, detachable design. The front end is cylindrical with a reinforced muzzle, and the overall build is solid, with minimal decorative elements, emphasizing function over form.
description: A tactical, matte black shotgun with a boxy body, exposed wiring, and a pistol grip, designed for robust urban use. It features a vented top, a detachable box magazine, and a reinforced muzzle.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, vented top, exposed wiring, pistol grip, and box magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the cylindrical muzzle and symmetrical venting, with the grip and magazine less visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with similar visibility of the venting, wiring, grip, and magazine.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock and grip, with the barrel and muzzle receding into the background.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with vented ribbing along the top
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, rounded trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
